use_cases: User authentication forms like login and registration pages
Contact forms in customer-facing web applications
Search input fields with animated label interactions
Data entry forms in admin dashboards and settings
Profile and account update forms with elegant label transitions
ai_summary: A minimalist floating-label text input component featuring letter-by-letter spring animations. When the input gains focus or contains a value, the label characters animate upward with staggered timing and color fade, creating an engaging micro-interaction. Supports dark mode with a clean zinc color palette and transparent background styling suitable for modern SaaS applications.
